working_on: Issue #90 (extract validate_shared_state_health into new health_probe phase, contract-fold ADR 0063, close T1-B via Path B) + Issue #65 (uv lock adoption: pyproject.toml, uv.lock, ADR 0064, dependency-discipline.md ops doc, validate_uv_lock_freshness soft-warn, first-exercise readiness note).

scope_delivery.explanation: Delivered the approved plan in full. Issue #90: ADR 0063 contract-folded to four-phase model; both validate_shared_state_health AND validate_issue_collisions extracted from structural into new health_probe phase (Path B per readiness-note T1-B); structural 458ms post-fix vs 3700ms pre; T1-B closed via Path B variant; 12 pytests. Issue #65: new ADR 0064; pyproject.toml + uv.lock at repo root; uv sync canonical install; new validate_uv_lock_freshness soft-warn; new dependency-discipline.md ops doc; first-exercise readiness note; 6 new pytests; requirements.txt retained as redirect pointer. Cross-references updated in CLAUDE.md, ADR README, ops README, code-discipline.md, mempalace-operations.md, session-start.sh, validate-interpretation classification map. Mid-session refinement: validate_uv_lock_freshness initially placed in structural phase, moved to health_probe after exercise showed it pushed structural over target — same principled abstraction (subprocess to external system = health_probe) consistently applied. Unblocks 5 downstream Tier 1 SWE-hardening Issues (#67/#68/#69/#70/#71).

outcome_summary: Bundled #90 + #65. #90: contract-folded ADR 0063 to four-phase model; extracted both validate_shared_state_health AND validate_issue_collisions out of structural into new health_probe phase (Path B per readiness-note T1-B drawer_paideia_decisions [boot-recall]; structural 458ms post-fix vs 3700ms pre); 12 pytests; readiness-note T1-B closed. #65: adopted uv lock per new ADR 0064 (decision drawer_paideia_decisions_571ec3915b40d536ec06f05e); pyproject.toml + uv.lock at repo root; uv sync canonical install; new validate_uv_lock_freshness soft-warn in health_probe phase; new dependency-discipline.md ops doc; first-exercise readiness note; 6 new pytests. Unblocks 5 downstream Tier 1 SWE-hardening Issues (#67/#68/#69/#70/#71). 167 pytests pass; ruff + mypy clean.
